title: Palindrome Kontrolu
subtitle: Kelime ve sayilarin palindrome testi.
code:
def palindrome?(text)
  cleaned = text.downcase.gsub(" ", "")
  cleaned == cleaned.reverse
end

def number_palindrome?(number)
  text = number.to_s
  text == text.reverse
end

words = ["kayak", "araba", "anna", "elma", "a man a plan a canal panama"]

puts "Kelime testleri:"
words.each do |word|
  puts "'#{word}' palindrome mu: #{palindrome?(word)}"
end

puts "\nSayi testleri:"
numbers = [12321, 12345, 1001, 5]
numbers.each do |num|
  puts "#{num} palindrome mu: #{number_palindrome?(num)}"
end

# Bir cumledeki palindrome kelimeleri bulma
sentence = "anna ve oto kelimeleri palindrome ama ruby degil"
puts "\nCumledeki palindrome kelimeler:"
sentence.split.each do |word|
  puts "- #{word}" if palindrome?(word) && word.length > 1
end
